q: I hold the NFL record with 7 Super Bowl titles as a quarterback. Who am I?
Known as 'The Greatest Show on Turf,' this quarterback won Super Bowl XXXIV with the Rams after going undrafted. Name him.
I rushed for 2,105 yards in a single season with the Los Angeles Rams in 1984, setting a record that stood for nearly two decades. Who am I?
This wide receiver holds the NFL career record with 1,549 receptions. Name him.
I was the head coach of the Green Bay Packers for the first two Super Bowls, both victories. The Super Bowl trophy is named after me. Who am I?
This running back averaged 5.2 yards per carry over his career with the Cleveland Browns from 1957 to 1965, retiring at age 29. Name him.
I threw for 5,477 yards in a single season with the New England Patriots in 2011, setting a franchise record. Who am I?
This quarterback threw for 55 touchdowns in a single season with the Indianapolis Colts in 2013, setting the single-season record at the time. Name him.
Known as the 'Immaculate Reception,' Franco Harris made his legendary catch in a 1972 playoff game while playing for which team?
I set the NFL record with 48 consecutive regular-season starts for a quarterback with the Miami Dolphins and never won a Super Bowl despite reaching two. Who am I?
This head coach won 6 Super Bowls with the New England Patriots, the most by any head coach in NFL history. Name him.
I caught 'The Catch' from Joe Montana in the 1981 NFC Championship Game against the Dallas Cowboys. Who am I?
This quarterback led the largest Super Bowl comeback in history, overcoming a 25-point deficit in Super Bowl LI. Name him.
I hold the NFL career rushing record with 18,355 yards, all with the Dallas Cowboys. Who am I?
This Kansas City Chiefs quarterback threw for 5,250 yards and 50 touchdowns in his first season as a starter in 2018. Name him.
I am the only player in NFL history to rush for over 2,000 yards in a 14-game season, doing so with the Buffalo Bills in 1973. Who am I?
David Tyree made his famous 'Helmet Catch' in Super Bowl XLII while playing for which team?
This quarterback threw for 71,940 career passing yards, all with the same franchise, making him the all-time leader for a single team at the time of his retirement. Name him.
I coached the 1972 Miami Dolphins to the only perfect season in NFL history, going 17-0. Who am I?
This defensive end holds the NFL single-season sack record with 22.5 sacks, set in 2001 while playing for the New York Giants. Name him.
I am the only wide receiver in NFL history to record 1,000 or more receiving yards in 11 consecutive seasons, doing so with the Minnesota Vikings and Arizona Cardinals. Who am I?
This San Francisco 49ers head coach invented the 'West Coast Offense' and won three Super Bowls. Name him.
